task_completion.description: Open the correct .env configuration file for editing or viewing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) or terminal command (e.g., cat, less) displaying the contents of '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env'.
The line 'APP_NAME="MarketPulse Hub"' (or without quotes if the agent typed it that way, though quotes are standard) is visible in the file editor or terminal output.

task_completion.description: Update the MAIL_DRIVER, MAIL_HOST, and MAIL_PORT configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lines 'MAIL_DRIVER=smtp', 'MAIL_HOST=smtp.marketpulse.io', and 'MAIL_PORT=587' are visible in the file editor or terminal output.

task_completion.description: Update the MAIL_USERNAME, MAIL_PASSWORD, and MAIL_ENCRYPTION configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lines 'MAIL_USERNAME=notifications@marketpulse.io', 'MAIL_PASSWORD=MPulse!Notify2024', and 'MAIL_ENCRYPTION=tls' are visible in the file editor or terminal output.
The line 'SESSION_LIFETIME=480' is visible in the file editor or terminal output.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the .env file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal prompt returning after a save action in an editor, a 'File saved' message, or a subsequent 'cat'/'grep' command showing the updated values successfully written to the file.

integrity.description: Ensure other settings in the .env file remain unchanged.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show other standard Laravel/Socioboard .env variables (like DB_*, REDIS_*, etc.) still present in the file, proving the file was not completely overwritten with only the new values.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the file rather than just printing the expected output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of a real text editor (nano, vim, gedit) or valid terminal commands (sed, echo >>) to modify the file, rather than just echoing the text to the console without redirecting to the file.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the editor header, terminal command, or window title must specifically be '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env. Expected values to verify: APP_NAME="MarketPulse Hub", MAIL_DRIVER=smtp, MAIL_HOST=smtp.marketpulse.io, MAIL_PORT=587, MAIL_USERNAME=notifications@marketpulse.io, MAIL_PASSWORD=MPulse!Notify2024, MAIL_ENCRYPTION=tls, SESSION_LIFETIME=480.
